description: A vertical 'Case Spotlight' title card. The background is a dark blue textured wall. From the top center hangs a black flashlight on a cord, angled downward, casting a white triangular beam of light down the middle of the image. Centered over the beam is a large bold title in two stacked words: 'CASE' (white and yellow) and 'SPOTLIGHT' (golden-yellow), in a heavy condensed sans-serif. A horizontal divider band runs near the bottom, beneath which sit the DHS seal and the white 'ICE' wordmark. The tweet describes a Santa Claus impersonator and retired teacher arrested by HSI Newark for child sexual abuse material.
